## Checklist

<!-- Check every box that applies before requesting review. -->

- [ ] I checked for secrets, personal data, and local-only paths.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `bun run test` passes.
- [ ] `bun run pack:smoke` passes when package output changed.
- [ ] Breaking changes, if any, are called out in this description.

## Asset snapshot checklist

<!-- Required if you touched packages/assets-humation-1. Check "Not applicable" otherwise. -->

- [ ] Raw SVG files, `manifest.json`, and generated `src/` manifest modules are in sync.
- [ ] `packages/assets-humation-1/src/assets.test.ts` passes.
- [ ] Not applicable.
